name: GPT-5.5
description: OpenAI's frontier model for the most complex professional and agentic work, with strong reasoning and tool use

limitations: premium pricing, can be slower than lighter models

name: GPT-4.1
description: Balanced model with major gains in coding, instruction following, and long context over GPT-4o
capabilities: coding, instruction following, long document analysis
sample_prompts: Refactor this function for readability
Summarize this long report

name: Claude Opus 4.7
description: Anthropic's flagship model for vision, long-horizon agents, and instruction-following precision
capabilities: long-horizon agentic tasks, vision, precise instruction following
sample_prompts: Act as an agent to complete this multi-step task
Review this image and describe what you see

name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
description: Anthropic's recommended default model — best balance of speed, intelligence, and cost
capabilities: coding, agent workflows, extended thinking, balanced cost
limitations: less capable than Opus on the hardest tasks
sample_prompts: Write and test a small web app feature
Explain this error and suggest a fix

name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
description: Google's flagship reasoning model with an industry-leading 2M token context window
capabilities: deep multimodal reasoning, huge context, computer use, agentic workflows
limitations: paid-only tier, higher cost above 200K context
sample_prompts: Analyze this entire research paper and summarize key findings
Compare these charts and explain the trend

name: Gemini 3 Flash
description: High speed, high value model for agentic workflows, multi-turn chat, and coding assistance
capabilities: near-Pro level reasoning, fast tool use, multimodal understanding
limitations: slightly less accurate than Gemini 3.1 Pro on the hardest tasks
sample_prompts: Quick answer with an image description
Help me debug this short script

name: DeepSeek V4
description: Open-weight Mixture-of-Experts model leading coding and reasoning benchmarks at a fraction of closed-model cost
capabilities: advanced reasoning, coding, math, long-horizon agent workflows
limitations: newer ecosystem, self-hosting needs significant hardware
sample_prompts: Solve this math problem step by step
Write an efficient sorting algorithm

name: Llama 4 Scout
description: Meta's open-weight model with an industry-leading 10M token context window for self-hosted deployments
capabilities: massive context handling, chat, coding, self-hosting
limitations: weaker than closed frontier models, needs own infrastructure
sample_prompts: Analyze this entire codebase in one pass
Write a product description
